summary: Campaign Planning & Execution platform has significant UI and planning functionality implemented, but critical backend infrastructure (queue worker, cron, OAuth posting, token encryption) is incomplete or mocked. Database schema exists but needs consolidation. No tests or CI/CD pipeline found.

completed.notes: Complete 12-week planning interface with AI enhancement capabilities. Users can create campaigns, define weekly themes, and generate daily content plans.
Comprehensive database schema with 21 tables covering campaigns, scheduling, media, analytics, and system config. Migration script is idempotent. Schema validation tool exists.
AI chat interfaces with GPT and Claude integration. Can generate 12-week plans, enhance weekly/daily content, and provide campaign suggestions.
Complete voice recording, transcription via Whisper/AssemblyAI, and voice notes management. Browser speech recognition for chat input.
Platform-specific posting services for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook. Validation logic and content limits configured per platform.
OAuth configuration and callback handlers exist for all platforms. Token exchange and profile fetching implemented.
Comprehensive UI components for campaign management, content creation, scheduling, and viewing. Platform-specific form components exist.

needs_improvement.description: SimpleQueue exists (lib/services/queue.ts) but uses in-memory Map, doesn't persist to queue_jobs table, and doesn't use BullMQ despite being in package.json. Worker doesn't integrate with database.
needs_improvement.evidence: lib/services/queue.ts (lines 1-206) - SimpleQueue class uses Map, simulatePosting(), no DB integration
acceptance_criteria: Queue worker uses BullMQ with Redis connection
Jobs persisted to queue_jobs table in database
Worker processes jobs from queue_jobs.scheduled_post_id
Status updates reflected in scheduled_posts.status field

suggested_ticket.title: Implement Production Queue Worker with BullMQ
suggested_ticket.description: Replace SimpleQueue with BullMQ-based worker that persists to queue_jobs table and integrates with scheduled_posts

needs_improvement.description: No cron job implementation found. Schedule endpoint (pages/api/scheduler/schedule.ts) only logs to console, doesn't persist to database or trigger queue processing.
needs_improvement.evidence: pages/api/scheduler/schedule.ts (lines 24-35) - console.log only, no DB persistence. No cron files found in search.
acceptance_criteria: Cron job runs every 60 seconds checking scheduled_posts where scheduled_for <= NOW()
Due posts added to queue_jobs table with status 'pending'
No duplicate jobs created for same post
Cron handles errors gracefully

suggested_ticket.title: Implement Cron Job for Processing Scheduled Posts
suggested_ticket.description: Create background cron (Vercel Cron or API route) that queries scheduled_posts and creates queue_jobs for due posts

needs_improvement.description: Posting services (lib/services/posting.ts) use simulateApiCall() - all platforms return mocked results. No actual API calls to LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube.
needs_improvement.evidence: lib/services/posting.ts (lines 74-82, 94-103) - simulateApiCall() methods, mocked platformPostId generation
acceptance_criteria: Real API calls to platform APIs (LinkedIn API, Twitter API v2, Instagram Graph API, Facebook Graph API, YouTube Data API)
Actual posts published to platforms return real platform_post_id
API errors handled with proper error codes
OAuth tokens retrieved from social_accounts table

suggested_ticket.title: Replace Mocked Posting with Real Platform API Calls
suggested_ticket.description: Implement actual posting API calls for all 5 platforms using stored OAuth tokens from social_accounts table

needs_improvement.description: No token encryption implementation found. OAuth tokens stored in plaintext in social_accounts table. No encryption utilities or crypto functions detected.
needs_improvement.evidence: lib/social-auth.ts (lines 66-91) - exchangeCodeForToken() stores tokens without encryption. No encrypt/decrypt functions found in grep search.
acceptance_criteria: Access tokens encrypted before storing in social_accounts.access_token
Refresh tokens encrypted before storing
Tokens automatically decrypted when retrieved for API calls
Encryption key stored in environment variable or secret manager

suggested_ticket.title: Encrypt OAuth Tokens at Rest
suggested_ticket.description: Implement token encryption/decryption utility using crypto or Supabase Vault, encrypt tokens on save, decrypt on use

needs_improvement.description: Media schema exists (media_files, scheduled_post_media tables) but no upload API endpoint or UI component found. No /api/media/upload.ts or AssetUploader component.
needs_improvement.evidence: db-utils/additional-social-media-tables.sql (media_files table exists). No pages/api/media/upload.ts found in search.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/media/upload endpoint accepts multipart/form-data
Files validated for type, size (max 100MB), security
Files stored in Supabase Storage with public URLs
Media metadata saved to media_files table
Drag-and-drop upload UI component

suggested_ticket.title: Media Upload API and UI
suggested_ticket.description: Create file upload endpoint, integrate with Supabase Storage, create AssetUploader component with drag-and-drop

needs_improvement.description: Multiple schema files exist (59 files in database/ folder) with potential conflicts. safe-database-migration.sql exists but multiple other schemas (complete-setup.sql, comprehensive-scheduling-schema.sql, etc.) suggest inconsistency.
needs_improvement.evidence: database/ folder has 51 *.sql files including complete-setup.sql, comprehensive-scheduling-schema.sql, clean-unified-schema.sql, step-by-step-tables.sql
acceptance_criteria: Single consolidated schema file as source of truth
Migration script converts existing database to consolidated schema
All schema files documented with purpose and status
Schema validation confirms consistency

suggested_ticket.title: Database Schema Consolidation
suggested_ticket.description: Audit all schema files, identify conflicts, create consolidated schema, migration plan to unify structure

needs_improvement.description: No test files found in codebase. Only test files in node_modules (dependencies). No test directory, no jest.config, no test scripts in package.json.
needs_improvement.evidence: No tests/ or __tests__/ directories found. package.json scripts don't include 'test'. No .test.ts or .spec.ts files in source code.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for critical services (queue, scheduling, posting)
Integration tests for API endpoints
Test coverage > 60% for core modules
CI pipeline runs tests on PR

suggested_ticket.title: Add Test Coverage
suggested_ticket.description: Setup Jest/Vitest, add unit tests for services, integration tests for APIs, configure coverage reporting

needs_improvement.description: No CI/CD pipeline found. No .github/workflows/ directory, no .gitlab-ci.yml, no deployment configuration. No automated testing or deployment.
needs_improvement.evidence: No .github/workflows/*.yml files found. No CI configuration files detected.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions or GitLab CI pipeline configured
Runs tests on pull requests
Linting and type checking
Deploys to staging on merge to main
Runs database migrations

suggested_ticket.title: Setup CI/CD Pipeline
suggested_ticket.description: Configure GitHub Actions workflow for testing, linting, type checking, and automated deployment

blockers.title: Queue Worker Not Production-Ready
blockers.description: SimpleQueue is in-memory only, doesn't persist to database, and doesn't use BullMQ. Scheduled posts cannot execute without proper queue infrastructure.
blockers.impact: Core scheduling functionality non-functional. Posts will be lost on server restart. No job persistence or recovery.
blockers.evidence: lib/services/queue.ts - SimpleQueue uses Map, no DB integration, simulatePosting() method

blockers.title: Posting APIs Are Mocked
blockers.description: All platform posting services return simulated results. No actual social media API integration. Posts will fail in production.
blockers.impact: Cannot actually publish content to any platform. Critical MVP functionality missing.
blockers.evidence: lib/services/posting.ts - simulateApiCall() methods, mocked platformPostId generation

blockers.title: No Token Encryption
blockers.description: OAuth tokens stored in plaintext. Security vulnerability - compromised database exposes all social account access.
blockers.impact: High security risk. Tokens exposed if database compromised. Violates security best practices.
blockers.evidence: lib/social-auth.ts - exchangeCodeForToken() stores tokens directly, no encryption

recommended_checks: Audit all 51 SQL files in database/ folder for conflicts
Check for duplicate table definitions across schema files
Validate foreign key constraints exist and are correct
Ensure all indexes from safe-database-migration.sql are created

recommended_alerts: API rate limit warnings per platform

next_actions.title: Implement Production Queue Worker (BullMQ)
next_actions.why: Critical blocker - SimpleQueue is in-memory only and doesn't persist. Scheduled posts cannot execute reliably.

next_actions.title: Replace Mocked Posting with Real APIs
next_actions.why: Core MVP functionality - actual posting to social platforms is essential. Current implementation only simulates.

next_actions.title: Implement Token Encryption
next_actions.why: Security vulnerability - OAuth tokens in plaintext expose user accounts if database compromised.

next_actions.title: Create Cron Job for Scheduled Posts
next_actions.why: Required to trigger queue processing. Schedule endpoint doesn't persist or process posts.

next_actions.title: Add Media Upload API
next_actions.why: Media schema exists but no upload endpoint. Users cannot attach images/videos to posts.

next_actions.title: Setup Test Framework
next_actions.why: No test coverage means regressions likely. Critical for maintaining code quality as system grows.

next_actions.title: Configure CI/CD Pipeline
next_actions.why: Automated testing and deployment essential for team productivity and code quality.

next_actions.title: Consolidate Database Schemas
next_actions.why: Multiple schema files create confusion and migration risks. Need single source of truth.
